data.title: XRP Ticks Higher On News That Ripple-SEC Case Could End Soon—Legal Team Reportedly Negotiating More 'Favorable Terms' On $125 Million Fine

data.title: Jamie Dimon's Crypto Change Of Heart? Trump Once Claimed Shift, But JPMorgan CEO Still A Skeptic When It Comes To Bitcoin
data.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon is well-known in cryptocurrency circles for his fierce criticism of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), even going so far as to dub the leading coin a "fraud."
